findings.description: The single section s1 consolidates all 12 element descriptions (component-configuration, import, config-file, component, property, list, component-ref, value, map, entry, key-component, value-component) into one section exceeding 2000 characters. The source has one h2 (dashes underline) containing 12 h3 subsections (equals underlines), but the knowledge file does not split at any of these h3 boundaries.
findings.source_evidence: Source has h2: 'コンポーネント設定ファイル 要素 リファレンス' (----) with 12 child h3 sections (====): component-configuration, import, config-file, component, property, list, component-ref, value, map, entry, key-component, value-component.

findings.description: The hints array is missing 'class', which is a required attribute (class(必須)) of the component element — a central concept in DI container configuration. Also missing 'None', a valid value for the autowireType attribute.
findings.source_evidence: Source component 要素 attributes table: 'class(必須) コンポーネントのクラス名を指定する。' and autowireType values list includes '* None: 自動インジェクションを行わない。'
